transcript.text:
(Today's munch menu)
(Korean soul food, bulgogi)
(and...)
(Toast?)
(Today's real munch menu)
Long time no "Isaac Toast"
("Isaac Toast" is back with a new bulgogi sandwich) This smells so nice already
(The best quality sandwich ever)
(It looks amazing already) This new sandwich is revolutionary!
(Easily CLEAR)
Unbelievable
(Shall we try this incredible new sandwich today?)
(Daechi-dong, Gangnam-gu, Seoul)
Hello everyone!
Today,
I came to "Isaac Toast"

I came here because they released new sandwiches
I feel so thankful that
they call me every year when they release new sandwiches
Thank you so much!
I actually like "Isaac Toast" so much
(I can't wait to try the new sandwiches...!) and I heard they released new sandwiches
I'm so excited about it
(Let's go) I'll go check it out now!
(More simple and cute) Their logo changed!
I remember it was something else before
This must be it!
Bulgogi...!
(It's the new sandwich...!) Real bulgogi?
(Let's try it) I'll head inside first
This is the menu
Look...

It's the brand new sandwich!
(The new bulgogi menu, "I'm Bulgogi") There are two types of bulgogi
There is Bulgogi Special and Double Cheese Bulgogi
These chicken sandwiches are new, too
(4 types of new chicken sandwiches) Chicken?
The quality looks very good
("Isaac Toast" / This customer will eat everything she orders) 4 Double Cheese Bulgogi
and 3 Bulgogi Special
- Yes - And 1 Chicken Special
1 Hot Bacon Chicken,
- Chili Mayo Chicken - Chili Mayo Chicken
(Bulgogi Special & Double Cheese Bulgogi) You can taste the real smoky bulgogi here
(Are you ready to try something new and delicious?)
(Signature sauce of "Isaac Toast")
(It's bulgogi, not patties...!)
(Bulgogi in the house!)

(Fried chicken that's freshly fried in the store)
(The new crispy chicken sandwich is ready as well)
(Arrived) Wow, it's been a while since I tried "Isaac Toast"
(The delicious bulgogi smell stimulates my nose..!) It smells so delicious already!
This is one with the bulgogi
It's Double Cheese Bulgogi
I'll put it in the wrap
Thank you for the food!
It's Double Cheese, it has mozzarella cheese,
(Ingredients) cheddar cheese, egg, and a lot of bulgogi in here
This new sandwich is amazing...!
The smoky flavor of the bulgogi is amazing!
(Amazing)
(What a nice cheese pull)
Firstly, the bulgogi is a bit sweet
but it's super moist

and goes well with the cheese
Interestingly,
it doesn't have sauce
so as soon as I bite it,
I can smell the smoky bulgogi
and taste it
right away
Wow, cheese is amazing..!
(Incredible quality) The quality is exceptional!
At "Isaac Toast",
I used to eat Ham & Cheese all the time
If Ham & Cheese is a more simple sandwich,
this bulgogi sandwich is
(Exceptional quality) very classical with the taste of bulgogi
Wow, I feel this every time
whenever I try a new item at "Isaac Toast"

("Isaac Toast" never disappoints me) I always try the new items whenever it comes out
I think they come up with great ideas
The next one is...
This is also a new one as well
Are you enjoying them, Tzuyang?
I can smell the smoky flavor...
(Amazing)
(Staff's pick!) I like Bulgogi Special better
You like Bulgogi Special better?
(I wonder how Bulgogi Special will taste like...!) Thank you, I'll enjoy them
(I wonder how Bulgogi Special will taste like...!) Enjoy!
(Ingredients: Original bulgogi, egg, corn, cheddar, cabbage) It's full of cabbage!
(Sauce: Bulgogi sauce, sweet mayo sauce
(Is it yummy?)
(Is it good?)
(Unbelievable, right?)

(Is it amazing?)
(Ha...)
- (Enlightenment) - It has a total different taste
This one has the sauce inside
The sauce is definitely delicious!
I was worried since it had cabbage
(Even anti-veg person loves it..) but it's pretty much tied
(Grilled bulgogi instead of a patty) Based on what I know, they already have a bulgogi sandwich
That's with a patty
But this has real bulgogi inside!
(The reason why they call Tzuyang every year) Because you eat very deliciously...
And you like "Isaac Toast", don't you?
That's right, I love it!
So do we...
Would you invite me next year as well?
(Lifetime contract) Promise!

(Signed) Next year as well
Yay
Since the bulgogi is the main,
I'll eat another one first
(Starting with the crust first...)
By the way,
"Isaac Toast" has its signature jam
(The signature sauce) or sauce that they put on the toast, right?
I can taste that from the crust as well
(The reason why all the sandwiches are delicious at "Isaac Toast") I think they put it in all the sandwiches
It's much
bigger than the
regular sandwich
This time
(Ingredients: cabbage, pickles (Tzuyang removed it), ham, fried chicken) It's called Chicken Special
(Sauce: Chili sauce) It's very cost-effective

They fry the chicken at the store
It's so high quality
It's only 4,500 won
(I can't believe this chicken is for a sandwich...) It's fried chicken from "Isaac Toast"?
The fried chicken patty quality
is like the crispy chicken
in chicken burgers
It's so delicious...
Because they deep-fry the chicken at the store,
it's so tender and moist..
and the batter is amazing...!
I ate "Isaac Toast" in elementary school
It's been so long
It's already been 20 years, it's their 20th anniversary this year
There's an event
over there!

(Showing off the neighborhood's "Isaac Toast" EVENT)
Gold bar?
(Please check it out at the website!) You can find a nearest store
(Please check it out at the website!) and participate in the event!
Bulgogi next!
The cabbage in here is more delicious than I thought
It balances out the oiliness
When I eat "Isaac Toast",
"Isaac Toast"
has its own unique flavor
(You can never eat other sandwich) No other sandwich is like "Isaac Toast"
Wow, this looks so good
This one looked the best
I wanted to try this one the most
(The 4 new chicken menu) It's Hot Bacon Chicken
There's bacon

(Ingredients: egg, corn, cheddar cheese, fried chicken) It comes with chili sauce and spicy chili sauce
There are two like this
Wow, this...
(Good job!) This should get a compliment, it's so good
It's spicy!
Look at how juicy it is!
(It's so juicy)
Wow, it's spicy
but delicious...
This is really delicious
But what's disappointing is
that it's not sold in all stores
It's only sold in certain ones
But places that don't sell it
are going to start selling it
(Please check the website first) So more branches are offering the new menu right now

I don't get sick of this
even if I keep eating it
(Korean taste) You don't get sick of bulgogi!
There's a generous amount of meat
(Full) Look at how much meat there is
(Good)
But...
This and the 4 new chicken sandwiches
definitely make you more full
than the regular Ham & Cheese toast
It's very filling
Definitely!
Bulgogi...
Bulgogi Special!
(Eating the crust right away)
Nice!

(Disaster)
(Stop ruining your shirts...)
This is...
Chili Mayo Chicken!
(Ingredients: cabbage, pickles (not for Tzuyang), fried chicken) It has the yellow chili sauce like this
It's so delicious!
The sauce is amazing
It's the same chicken
but it tastes completely different
I think the chili mayo is a hit
It's so good
It's hot
(6 glasses of iced tea already...) The iced tea is good
(Double Cheese Bulgogi) I have one left
It's still good no matter how many I eat
I ate so much "Isaac Toast"

in university
("Isaac Toast" is so delicious...) It's cheap and perfect for a meal
It's convenient to eat
How many drinks did I have today?
("Only" 7... Yes...) Why does it look like so much when I only drank 7?
Is it because the cup is big?
Last one
(She's already drunk more than 2L of iced tea...)
I always like new menus from "Isaac Toast"
They add a generous amount
It's very filling
(Bulgogi & Chicken) It's made of filling ingredients
(You can have a hearty meal with toast) It feels like I'm eating something really big
(All clear)
(Very impressed...)
8 glasses of iced tea...

Amazing
Tzuyang,
- what was your favorite? - (Tormented)
All of them were so delicious
(Bulgogi PICK) The Bulgogi Special was more delicious
Among the chicken ones,
(Chicken PICK) I liked the Chili Mayo Chicken
Because you ate so deliciously at "Isaac Toast",
we prepared this so that you can share
- Is it toast? - with your family
Thank you
(Even iced tea...!)
(I enjoyed it even at home) Thank you
I had a great meal today!
